description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/stuko/ovito/linux_build:latest and defines a single stage called build. Add a test_linux job in the build stage that runs on runners tagged linux. The job executes the following shell commands in order: mkdir build, cd build, cmake -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=../install .., cmake --build . --parallel --target install, ../install/bin/ovito --nogui, and ctest --output-on-failure. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
